english: What is the primary benefit of filing income tax returns in India, even if an individual's income is below the taxable limit?
hindi: भारत में आयकर रिटर्न दाखिल करने का मुख्य लाभ क्या है, भले ही व्यक्ति की आय कर योग्य सीमा से कम हो?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் வருமான வரி திருப்புச் செலுத்துவதன் முக்கிய நன்மை என்ன, ஒரு நபரின் வருமானம் வரி செலுத்த தகுதியற்ற வரம்புக்கு கீழே இருந்தாலும்?
vietnamese: Lợi ích chính của việc nộp tờ khai thuế thu nhập ở Ấn Độ là gì, ngay cả khi thu nhập của một cá nhân thấp hơn giới hạn chịu thuế?
correct_answer: The primary benefit is to claim a refund if taxes have been deducted, and to establish a record of income for loan or credit applications.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this by providing an incorrect benefit, such as stating that filing is mandatory even for non-taxable income, or by refusing to answer due to lack of specific statistics.
